mainEntity.name: What is a Virtual CFO and how is it different from an accountant?

acceptedAnswer.text: A Virtual CFO provides strategic financial leadership — fundraising, cash flow management, financial planning, investor reporting — while an accountant handles bookkeeping and compliance. Virtual CFO is forward-looking (planning and strategy), while accounting is backward-looking (recording transactions).

mainEntity.name: How much does Virtual CFO service cost in Chennai?

acceptedAnswer.text: Monthly packages start from Rs 25,000/month for early-stage companies. Pricing scales with complexity — transaction volume, fundraising activity, compliance requirements, and reporting frequency. Contact +91-99622 60333 for a customised proposal.

mainEntity.name: Can a Virtual CFO help with fundraising?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Fundraising support is a core Virtual CFO deliverable — financial model building, valuation analysis, investor deck review, due diligence data room preparation, and investor communication during the fundraising process.
